response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including embedded systems (C/C++), networking, and security-related projects. However, his background is heavily skewed toward web and high-level languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, D, Python absent) rather than embedded C programming for LAN-switch security features. While he has worked with Linux and low-level systems, there is no clear evidence of kernel modification, MACsec, 802.1X, or embedded switch-chip development. His Japanese proficiency is not confirmed, and his recent roles (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure) do not align closely with the embedded networking security focus.
strengths: Strong C/C++ experience with embedded systems (e.g., National Instruments, robotic arms)
Proven ability to work with Linux and low-level systems
Diverse technical background with problem-solving and system design skills
concerns: Limited direct experience with LAN-switch security features (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X, encryption protocols)
No clear evidence of Japanese language proficiency
Recent roles lean toward web/AI rather than embedded networking security
